subcodes.first_line: O My beloved! Verily, perfection in every undertaking is among the fruits of faith and certitude. Hold thou fast unto it, that thou mayest be firmly grounded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: يا حبيبی انّ الاتقان فی کلّ مشروع من نتائج الايمان و الايقان فعليک به حتّی تکون متمکّناً
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @excellence; distinction, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @thankfulness; gratitude
